overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a truck cabin driving on a snow-covered highway at night in a truck simulation game. Heavy snowfall reduces visibility as the vehicle passes other cars and navigates through road signs and exit ramps, with windshield wipers actively clearing the snow from the windshield.

events.description: red car overtakes on the left side in the adjacent lane
approaching traffic control gantry with signal lights ahead

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on snow-covered highway, maintaining lane position while windshield wipers actively clear heavy snowfall from the windshield

notable_agents.action: red sedan overtaking the truck on the left side in the passing lane

entered.detail: illuminated Mercedes truck dashboard with speedometer, gauges, and control panels
steering wheel with Mercedes logo and driver hands visible gripping the wheel
GPS navigation screen displaying the route with purple highlighted path and map details
snow-covered asphalt highway stretching into the dark distance with visible lane markings
tall street light poles lining the left side of the highway illuminating the road
metal highway guardrails along the right shoulder of the road
overhead gantry structure with traffic lights spanning across the highway lanes

segments.scene_description: The video opens from the driver's perspective inside a Mercedes truck cabin navigating a snow-covered highway at night. Heavy snowfall is visible against the headlights as the truck maintains steady speed. A red sedan overtakes on the left side around the 6-second mark, and the truck approaches a traffic control gantry with signal lights visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway stretch past intersection with guardrails

events.description: passing under the traffic control gantry at the intersection
slight lane positioning adjustment while maintaining highway speed

agents.ego_description: continuing highway journey past the intersection, navigating through light snow conditions with wipers active

entered.detail: small directional sign on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The truck passes under the traffic control gantry and continues along the open highway stretch. Guardrails line both sides of the snow-covered road as street lights pass by on the left. The windshield wipers maintain a steady rhythm clearing the accumulating snow while the truck maintains consistent speed through the winter night.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with directional signage for Drammen

events.description: passing green highway sign indicating E18 Drammen direction on the right
approaching and passing under large overhead gantry with directional signage

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while approaching and passing significant road signage indicating directions

entered.detail: green highway direction sign with white text indicating E18 Drammen route
large overhead sign gantry spanning the highway with multiple directional signs

segments.scene_description: The truck continues through the snowy highway as a large green road sign for E18 Drammen appears on the right side around the 32-second mark. Shortly after, the vehicle passes under a massive overhead gantry structure supporting directional signs. The guardrails continue along both sides of the road while snow accumulates on the windshield between wiper sweeps.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp area with multiple signage

events.description: exit ramp signs becoming visible on the right side of the highway
slight rightward lane positioning toward the exit ramp area

agents.ego_description: navigating highway exit area with multiple signage options and lane decisions

entered.detail: highway exit sign with directional arrows indicating upcoming exit
overhead gantry structure with exit lane information and directional arrows
highway exit ramp splitting off to the right side of the main road

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches a complex highway exit area with multiple signs directing traffic. An exit direction sign appears on the right, followed by an overhead gantry displaying exit lane information. The vehicle maintains position in the main lanes while passing the exit ramp junction on the right, with guardrails now primarily visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving highway section with warning signage

events.description: navigating rightward curve in the highway while reducing speed slightly
headlights illuminating tighter curve ahead with snow reflection

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly while navigating curved section of snow-covered highway with active wipers

entered.detail: road warning sign indicating curve ahead on the right side
reflective road markers and lane dividers visible in the headlights

segments.scene_description: The highway curves to the right as the truck navigates the bend in the road. A curve warning sign is visible on the right side, and the guardrails return to both sides of the road. The truck's headlights illuminate the snowy curve ahead, reflecting off the snow-covered surface while the wipers continue clearing the windshield. The vehicle maintains steady progress through the final section of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a truck cabin navigating a snow-covered highway at night as the vehicle passes through a series of road markers and gantries. It begins with the truck maintaining a steady speed through heavy snowfall, as a red sedan overtakes on the left just before the vehicle approaches a distant traffic control gantry. As the truck passes under the gantry, the scene opens into a stretch of highway lined with guardrails and passing street lights, while windshield wipers rhythmically clear the accumulating snow. The journey then continues past a large green road sign for E18 Drammen on the right before the camera moves under a massive overhead gantry supporting directional signs. Finally, the truck persists through the winter night, with snow continuing to build on the windshield between each sweep of the wipers.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a complex highway junction and transitions into a curving stretch of snow-covered road. It begins by approaching a series of directional signs and an overhead gantry that guide traffic toward an exit ramp on the right. As the vehicle maintains its position in the main lanes, the scene shifts to a view where guardrails are primarily visible on the left, passing the junction entirely. The highway then bends to the right, bringing a curve warning sign into view while guardrails reappear on both sides of the road. Finally, the truck's headlights illuminate the reflective, snow-covered surface of the bend as the windshield wipers continue to clear the heavy snowfall.
